articles.title: Ravi Mohan's ‘Idly Nadigai’ comment triggers Khushbu Sundar reaction; ‘Thank you for proving me right’
articles.description: Actor Ravi Mohan has publicly detailed marital struggles, alleging emotional distress and interference from an unnamed actress. Social media speculates this refers to Khushbu Sundar, who responded cryptically on X. Mohan also claimed his wife pressured him into marriage and spoke of financial difficulties and alleged black magic, stating he's suffering immensely.

articles.title: Who is Aarti Ravi? 'Jayam' Ravi Mohan’s estranged wife reacts strongly after Tamil actor breaks down amid split from Keneeshaa Francis

Aarti responded strongly on social media, warning against mistaking her silence for weakness, while actor-politician Khushbu Sundar publicly supported Aarti. Read on to know more about what she said.

articles.title: “Sitting alone...”: Dianna Russini’s controversial “thirst trap” clip sparks outrage as Mike Vrabel remains distant from it
articles.description: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini continue to be in the eye of the storm, even though it has been a month ever since their alleged affair photos from the Arizona hotel were leaked to the public sparking major outrage. Though both have made it clear that they have not been inappropriately involved with each other, millions have refused to believe it. Amid all the mess, Dianna Russini’s old clip has sparked chaos.

articles.title: 'My Friends' book review: Joys and traumas of teenage bonds
articles.description: Book review of My Friends follows teenage friendship, trauma and art in a small town, tracing Louisa and a group of boys, exploring masculinity, grief and healing through a painting that binds their lives together.

articles.title: 'The Complex' book review: Hollow at the core
articles.description: Book review of The Complex follows Delhi elite Chopra family, linking personal trauma, sexual violence and India's political shifts in a sprawling novel set across decades of Indian political fiction and family saga set in Delhi NCR.

articles.title: 'Absolute Jafar' book review: Remembrances that travel across borders
articles.description: Absolute Jafar by Sarnath Banerjee explores India Pakistan borders, Partition memory, and diaspora through walking narratives in Delhi and Karachi as cities become archives of feeling and everyday history of borderlands life and memory.

articles.title: ‘Amjad Khan kaunsa villain hai?’: Son recalls Tom Alter’s anecdote
articles.description: Nearly five decades after its release, Sholay continues to remain one of Indian cinema’s most iconic films. But according to actor-writer Shadaab Khan, son of legendary actor Amjad Khan, the film was not instantly embraced by audiences when it first hit theatres in 1975. Shadaab recalled a fascinating anecdote once narrated to him by late actor Tom Alter about how dramatically opinions around Sholay changed within just a few months of its release.

articles.title: Pati Patni Aur Woh Do Box Office Collection Day 2: Ayushmann's Comedy Sees Slight Jump But Fails To Cross Rs 10 Crore

articles.title: Dak Prescott moves on with ex-fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos’ bridesmaid? Viral photos with Caitlin Rance spark chaos
articles.description: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott was seen with Caitlin Rance, a former bridesmaid from his canceled wedding to Sarah Jane Ramos, at the PBR World Finals. Rance was a close friend to both Prescott and Ramos, knowing them since their Mississippi State days. Prescott denied dating rumors, calling them longtime friends, though sources remain unconvinced.

articles.title: Belmont Cameli once gave up a kidney through a swap programme to help his childhood friend
articles.description: Actor Belmont Cameli's selfless act of donating a kidney to a stranger initiated a remarkable 14-person chain, ultimately saving seven lives, including his childhood friend Brendan Flaherty. This complex organ swap, requiring immense patience and coordination, highlights Cameli's profound generosity. His inspiring story has resurfaced as his career gains momentum, drawing attention to this life-altering kindness.

articles.description: Kamal Haasan met Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay and submitted six demands seeking support for the Tamil film industry while praising the government’s liquor shop closure decision.

articles.description: Former couple Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar announced that they were going their separate ways earlier this week. Fans noticed that they are now following each other again on Instagram.

articles.description: Salman Khan shared that his first expensive purchase was a Rolex watch for father Salim Khan, which he bought partly on loan despite not being financially stable then.

articles.description: Ajay Devgn’s Dhamaal 4 and Akshay Kumar’s Welcome To The Jungle will no longer clash at the box office. Reports suggest the decision came after both stars mutually agreed to avoid competition.

articles.title: Kohli Credits Anushka For Vegetarian Shift: Cricketer calls it his best decision; couple share meat-free food stories
articles.description: Cricket superstar Virat Kohli attributes his transition to a vegetarian lifestyle to the influence of his wife, Anushka Sharma. This change wasn't just about health; it was a reflection of their shared empathy for animals. As new parents, the couple now delves into a world of culinary adventures together, reaffirming their dedication to a mindful and harmonious living.

articles.title: Fortnite Overwatch Power Hour (May 16, 2026): Start timings for all regions
articles.description: Fortnite is hosting a special "Calling All Heroes Power Hour" event on May 16th, celebrating its Overwatch crossover. Players can experience Tracer's Pulse Pistols and Mercy's Caduceus Staff during two dedicated sessions. Timings vary by region, with specific slots for the Americas, Europe, and Asia-Pacific, offering a unique team-oriented gameplay experience.

articles.title: Leon Draisaitl and wife Celeste Desjardins combined net worth 2026: Edmonton Oilers star and actress contracts, endorsements and career earnings
articles.description: In 2026, the combined wealth of Edmonton Oilers star Leon Draisaitl and Canadian actress Celeste Desjardins grows. Draisaitl’s large NHL contracts, endorsement deals and career earnings continue to be the biggest contributors, while Desjardins has grown her entertainment and modeling success. Their improving financial profile has been a hot topic in NHL news roundup conversations this year.

articles.title: TRP Report: Vasudha wins over legendary shows Anupamaa and Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2
articles.description: Zee TV show Vasudha has made it to the numero uno spot with its drama. It has slowly and steadily won over the audience with its engaging narrative. Check out the full list for this week.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Abraham Lincoln: 'I have come to the conclusion never again to think of marrying, and for this reason, I can never be satisfied with anyone who would be blockhead enough to have me' - What ex-US President wanted to say about love, insecurity and relationships
articles.description: A resurfaced 1838 letter from Abraham Lincoln reveals his deep-seated insecurity about love, humorously questioning why anyone would marry him. This quote, mixing wit with vulnerability, resonates today as it shows common struggles with self-doubt and fear of rejection. Despite his early pronouncements, he later married Mary Todd. Read on!

articles.title: Marc Andreessen posts boardroom spoof video taking aim at General Catalyst ad
articles.description: Venture capitalist Marc Andreessen escalated a public spat with General Catalyst by posting a video mocking their viral ad for a fictional "Woof AI" product. Andreessen criticized the ad as condescending, sparking debate among industry professionals about the tone and message of the campaign.

articles.title: 'He created a PHENOMENAL empire': Saif opens up about SRK
articles.description: Saif Ali Khan lauded Shah Rukh Khan's early career confidence, highlighting his bold salary negotiations and unwavering belief in his worth. Saif revealed SRK's conviction in his body language and vision, which he credits for building a phenomenal empire and defining a generation of Bollywood. SRK's image, Saif noted, is synonymous with Bollywood itself. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Aarti Ravi' REACTS post Ravi Mohan’s emotional press meet
articles.description: Aarti Ravi has issued a strong statement on social media, warning against disturbing a "sleeping lioness" and asserting her readiness to protect her dignity and children. This follows emotional press interactions from Ravi Mohan, who spoke about his divorce and children, and Keneeshaa Francis's departure from social media amidst trolling.

articles.title: John Travolta recalled a terrifying mid-air ordeal
articles.description: Hollywood star John Travolta recounted a terrifying near-death experience during a London premiere. He revealed a total electrical failure over Washington D.C. in 1992, with his family aboard, leaving him believing he would die. Miraculously, he managed an emergency landing, a harrowing event that inspired his role in 'The Shepherd'.

articles.title: Anshumaan Pushkar & RJ Mahvash Exclusive Interview | Crime-Revenge Drama ‘Satrangi: Badle Ka Khel’
articles.description: Exclusive ANI interview with Anshumaan Pushkar and RJ Mahvash on ZEE5’s gripping new crime-revenge drama ‘Satrangi: Badle Ka Khel’! From intense plot twists to powerful performances, get the inside scoop on the most anticipated revenge thriller of the year. 0:00 - Anshumaan & RJ Mahvash Exclusive 0:31 - Behind the Scenes of Satrangi 2:01 - Actors’ Thoughts
